name: Spirox Corporation
summary: Spirox Corporation provides integrated solutions to the semiconductor, electronics manufacturing, telecom, and automobile markets worldwide. The company offers wafer level test handlers, analog/mixed signal and logic options, thermal chuck systems, memory testers, thermal and inverted emission microscopes, semiconductor test systems, mass production test handlers, automatic probers, power device test systems, fluxless reflow systems, wafer inspection systems, probe cards, docking interfaces, LCD driver IC test systems, and memory test systems. It has partnerships with AFORE Oy; ERS electronic GmbH; EXICON Co., Ltd.; Hamamatsu Corporation; HANWA Electronic Ind. Co., Ltd.; INTEKPLUS CO., Ltd.; Osai A.S.; SEMICS Inc.; ShibaSoku Corporation; STI Co. Ltd.; Toray Engineering Co., Ltd.; Translarity Inc.; Turbodynamics GmbH; Wintest Corp.; and YIK Corporation. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.
